x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Stale KB articles cause Now Assist to surface outdated solutions to agents and end users. AI Search ranks articles by relevance but cannot determine accuracy -- fresh content directly improves AI response quality.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Establish a KB governance process with mandatory annual review cycles. Use the KB article review queue to identify and update or retire stale articles. Target: ≤20% of published articles over 12 months old.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_f6f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c42
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Stale KB articles cause Now Assist to surface outdated solutions to agents and end users. AI Search ranks articles by relevance but cannot determine accuracy -- fresh content directly improves AI response quality.]]></ai_justification><check_name>KB Article Age and Staleness</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var gaPublished = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaPublished.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    gaPublished.addQuery('active', true);
    gaPublished.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaPublished.query();
    var published = gaPublished.next() ? parseInt(gaPublished.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (published === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No published KB articles found',
            finding: 'No published KB articles found. KB staleness cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-365);

    var gaStale = new GlideAggregate('kb_knowledge');
    gaStale.addQuery('workflow_state', 'published');
    gaStale.addQuery('active', true);
    gaStale.addQuery('sys_updated_on', '<', cutoff.getValue());
    gaStale.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaStale.query();
    var stale = gaStale.next() ? parseInt(gaStale.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((stale / published) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% stale (' + stale + ' of ' + published + ' articles over 12 months old)';

    if (pct <= 20) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of published KB articles are over 12 months old. KB content is current — Now Assist AI Search will return accurate, relevant results.'
        };
    } else if (pct <= 40) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of published KB articles are over 12 months old (target: ≤20%). Stale articles reduce Now Assist AI Search quality — establish a KB review cycle.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of published KB articles are over 12 months old. Majority of KB content is stale — Now Assist AI Search will return outdated information, degrading self-service quality.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>ITSM</module><number>CHK0000316</number><order>20</order><remediation_guidance>Establish a KB governance process with mandatory annual review cycles. Use the KB article review queue to identify and update or retire stale articles. Target: ≤20% of published articles over 12 months old.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>f6f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c42</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>KB Article Age and Staleness</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_f6f8d9c7cfd587108935fb251d851c42</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
